title: Schoberia prostrata
taxonomy: Schoberia prostrata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. It belongs to the genus Schoberia, which is a small group of plants native to tropical Africa. The plant is considered to be a member of the order Sapindales. This classification is based on its characteristics and relationships with other plants in the family Anacardiaceae. Schoberia prostrata is further classified as a species within the kingdom Plantae.

intro: Schoberia prostrata, also known as the Indian walnut, is a small tree or shrub native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia.
